recommendations.title: Crypto
recommendations.overview: A young agent is tasked with investigating a tangled web of corruption and fraud in New York.

recommendations.title: Muzzle

recommendations.title: Close
recommendations.overview: Two 13-year-old boys spend an idyllic summer together, but their connection is put to the test when they become the subject of speculation at school.

recommendations.title: Into the Wild
recommendations.overview: After graduating from Emory University in 1992, top student and athlete Christopher McCandless abandons his possessions, gives his entire $24,000 savings account to charity, and hitchhikes to Alaska to live in the wilderness.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Grand Illusion

recommendations.title: Strike!
recommendations.overview: In 1963 New England, a group of friends at an all-girls academy learn that they're going to be combined with a nearby all-boys institution. They concoct a plan to save their school while dealing with everyday problems along the way.

recommendations.title: The House of Flowers: The Movie
recommendations.overview: The De La Mora siblings concoct a mischievous plan to break into their old family home to retrieve a hidden treasure of significant importance.
